rationale.R1.2: The response identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides specific fixes, walking the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The response clearly marks several overreaching claims and suggests minimal repairs, enhancing transparency.
rationale.RX.3: The response covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional scope.
rationale.RX.4: The response avoids introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content while addressing potential downstream harms.
rationale.RX.5: While the response provides detailed critiques and suggested edits, it does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
